Who I am

About

Industrial AI consultant, reliability engineer, and writer — helping manufacturing organizations turn AI from a slide deck into a shop-floor reality.

Ankit Chawla

[Replace this paragraph with your real bio — a few sentences on your background, the industries you’ve worked in, and what you focus on today.]

I work at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, Reliability Engineering, and Digital Transformation — helping manufacturing organizations move past pilots and proofs-of-concept into AI that actually runs on the plant floor.

What I focus on

  • Practical AI adoption for manufacturing and industrial operations
  • Reliability engineering and asset performance
  • Digital transformation strategy for plant and operations teams
  • The RCAI Framework — a roadmap I developed for bringing AI into industrial contexts
